## Release impact

Add **one** release label so the release can be generated on merge:

- `release:major` — breaking changes
- `release:minor` — new features, backwards compatible
- `release:patch` — bug fixes
- `release:skip` — no release (docs, chore, internal)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` passes
